title: rubus hirtus var. hystriciformis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. hystriciformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a type of bramble that belongs to the Rubus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. hystriciformis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
